apps.name: Stock Manager
apps.tagline: Professional offline inventory management for products, stock movement, value and alerts.
apps.short_desc: Create a structured product catalog, track every stock movement, monitor inventory value and low-stock risk, then export or restore records without depending on a permanent internet connection.
apps.long_desc:
Stock Manager is designed for small and medium-sized businesses that need practical inventory control without a complex ERP workflow.

Key features:
- Product creation and editing with SKU, categories, photos and documents
- Barcode and QR scanning for faster lookup and entry
- Real-time stock levels and chronological transaction history
- Dashboard for product count, inventory value and recent movement
- Low-stock notifications and critical-level warnings
- CSV export, professional reports and data sharing
- Local SQLite storage and complete offline operation
- Android .sfbak backup and restore support
- Turkish, English, French, German and Dutch language support
release_notes: Improved Android backup and restore compatibility for .sfbak files.
Added support for opening Stock Manager backup files directly from Android file managers.
Improved backup file picker behavior on mobile devices.

feature_details.title: Product catalog and barcode capture
feature_details.description: Create and edit products with SKU, category, photos and documents, then use barcode or QR scanning to speed up lookup and entry.

feature_details.title: Real-time stock movement history
feature_details.description: Follow incoming stock, sales and adjustments in chronological order so every quantity change keeps its operational context.

feature_details.title: Inventory dashboard and shortage alerts
feature_details.description: Review total products, inventory value, recent movement, low-stock items and critical-level warnings from one decision surface.

feature_details.title: Offline storage, reports and backup
feature_details.description: Continue core work through local SQLite storage, export CSV records and move .sfbak backups through supported Android file workflows.

privacy_points: May process account, business, product and transaction records for inventory workflows.
Camera permission is used for barcode and QR scanning.
Storage access may be used for product images and exported reports.
Internet access may support synchronization, updates, security and support.

apps.name: Arrow Escape
apps.tagline: A memory-and-timing puzzle where arrow directions fade before the route is complete.
apps.short_desc: Read the arrows, remember directions after they fade, manage time and limited mistakes, then use boosters, missions and rewards to progress through increasingly complex boards.
apps.long_desc:
Arrow Escape is a fast-paced puzzle game where players follow arrows and find the correct path before time runs out.

Key features:
- Easy-to-learn arrow-based puzzle rules
- Signature fading-arrow system that tests short-term visual memory
- Time-based levels with increasing pressure
- Complex maps, lives and mistake limits
- Vision Cards that reveal faded arrows temporarily
- Time Freeze that pauses the countdown
- Hints that expose a useful move when the player is stuck
- Daily missions, streak rewards and additional prizes
- Coins, stars, level rewards and useful boosters
- Modern neon-purple visual style and responsive effects
apps.tech_stack: Flutter / Game loop / Rewarded ads / In-app purchases
release_notes: Launched Arrow Escape on Google Play.
Added fading arrow gameplay, timed levels and core booster flow.
Published initial puzzle progression, missions and reward economy.

feature_details.title: Fading-arrow memory mechanic
feature_details.description: Arrow heads disappear after the route is shown, forcing players to remember directions rather than reading a permanently visible board.

feature_details.title: Timer, lives and mistake limits
feature_details.description: Time-based levels and limited errors increase pressure while discouraging random tapping.

feature_details.title: Vision Cards, Time Freeze and hints
feature_details.description: Three distinct recovery tools reveal lost information, pause the countdown or expose a useful move without solving the full board.

feature_details.title: Missions, stars, coins and streak rewards
feature_details.description: Level rewards and daily goals create visible progression while remaining connected to successful puzzle play.

privacy_points: No login, membership registration, cloud profile or Devovia-owned server account is required.
Game progress, coins, stars, boosters, missions, streaks and settings may be stored locally on the device.
Google AdMob may process advertising identifiers, device information, approximate location and ad interaction data.
Optional in-app purchases are processed by Google Play Billing under Google Play rules.

apps.name: Daily Hadith
apps.tagline: Daily hadith, prayer times, Qibla direction, smart tasbih and spiritual media in one calm interface.
apps.short_desc: Read a selected hadith or quote, follow accurate prayer times, find Qibla, count dhikr with haptic feedback, listen through TTS and create shareable visual cards.
apps.long_desc:
Daily Hadith combines daily spiritual content with practical Islamic utilities in a polished mobile experience.

Key features:
- Hadith and Islamic quote of the day from trusted sources
- Accurate location-based prayer times
- Customizable prayer notifications
- Qibla compass for home and travel
- Smart tasbih with haptic feedback
- Text-to-speech audio playback
- Visual quote and hadith card creation
- Sharing to WhatsApp, Instagram and other apps
- Islamic calendar, holy days and weekly visual cards
- Multi-language reading and ML Kit translation support
- Theme, language and notification personalization
- Optional premium ad-free experience
apps.tech_stack: Flutter / Notifications / TTS / ML Kit translations
release_notes: Resolved prayer alarm scheduling edge cases.
Improved notification permission handling with system fallback.
Fixed data synchronization on app resume.

feature_details.title: Hadith and quote of the day
feature_details.description: Open to one selected hadith or Islamic quote from trusted sources without navigating an endless feed.

feature_details.title: Prayer times and customizable reminders
feature_details.description: Use location-based prayer calculations and permission-aware notifications to keep the next prayer visible.

feature_details.title: Qibla compass and haptic smart tasbih
feature_details.description: Find the prayer direction and count dhikr with tactile feedback inside the same interface.

feature_details.title: TTS audio, visual cards and Islamic calendar
feature_details.description: Listen to content, create designed cards for sharing and follow holy days through the Islamic calendar.

privacy_points: Location may be requested for prayer time calculation and Qibla direction, processed on-device.
Advertising providers such as Google AdMob and Unity Ads may process ad identifiers and ad interaction data.
Purchases are handled by Google Play or App Store; financial data is not collected by Devovia.
Language, theme, bookmarks, notification preferences and premium cache may be stored locally.

apps.name: TinySteps
apps.tagline: A clean habit tracker for flexible schedules, reminders, widgets and understandable consistency statistics.
apps.short_desc: Create daily, selected-day or weekly-frequency habits, receive local reminders, complete routines from the home-screen widget and review streaks without complicated charts.
apps.long_desc:
TinySteps is a simple habit tracker designed around small wins and consistent routines rather than pressure or complicated setup.

Key features:
- Daily habits, selected weekdays or X-times-per-week targets
- Smart local reminders
- Different reminder times per day for premium users
- Interactive home-screen habit widget
- Weekly habit progress and monthly consistency
- Longest streak and most consistent habit insights
- Routine and productivity tracking
- Light and dark mode
- Free plan with up to five habits
- Premium unlimited habits and advanced statistics
- Premium backup, export and advanced reminders
apps.tech_stack: Flutter / Local storage / Widgets / Notification scheduling
release_notes: Improved app startup performance and reduced initial load work.
Optimized habit and log reads for faster lists and summaries.
Simplified settings and polished in-app text.

feature_details.title: Daily, selected-day and weekly targets
feature_details.description: Create habits that repeat every day, on chosen weekdays or a selected number of times per week.

feature_details.title: Smart local reminders
feature_details.description: Keep routines visible at the right moment, with different reminder times by day available to premium users.

feature_details.title: Interactive home-screen widget
feature_details.description: View and complete today’s habits without opening the full application.

feature_details.title: Streaks and readable consistency statistics
feature_details.description: Review weekly progress, monthly consistency, longest streak and the most consistent habits without noisy charts.

privacy_points: No account is required and habit data is stored locally on the device.
Habit names, schedules, reminders, logs, theme and settings preferences remain on-device.
Free users may see Google AdMob ads; purchases are processed by Google Play Billing.
Notifications are scheduled locally when enabled.
